title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Weak to ordinary thunderstorms are possible for NE Poland & S Austria

---Risk Areas---

TSTM #1
NE Poland

Weak thunderstorms during stronger rain showers are possible.
There isnt any high confidence in severe weather phenomena

GNRL
S Austria

Ordinary to possibly stronger thunderstorms are expected for S Austria. The cape and shear overlay is pretty strong, meaning isolated supercell isnt ruled out
The main threat is:
- Hail
